creator: dettus@dettus.net
text:
Created attachment 238581
the initial port

This is the first port of my retro MP3 player d11amp.
(You can find the homepage here: https://www.dettus.net/d11amp)

Hopefully it could become part of FreeBSD's official ports tree. 
Given that it adheres to your quality standards, of course.

Any feedback is greatly appreciated.
